dsl_rule.translation_notes: Doji identified by small body_pct (<5%). Gap up condition expressed as close > prev_high. Heavy volume requirement uses hvol_20 (20-day historical volatility average as proxy for above-average volume). Exit uses mean reversion to sma_20 as reasonable reversal condition given AUTHOR_SILENT specification. Stop loss set to average_decline_pct of 6.70%. Gap type discrimination (breakaway vs exhaustion) cannot be precisely encoded without multi-bar pattern recognition; assumed breakaway dominates given continuation signal intent.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: Gapping Up Doji. Entry occurs when a doji candle gaps up from congestion area. Direction depends on gap type: breakaway gaps (higher volume, new highs) signal continuation; exhaustion gaps appear near end of upward trend.
